{{CargoRelic
|name=Chronometer
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|birthday=07-02
|source=Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (1.1%), Tool Chest (2%)
|description=On Jul 2, 1519, the world's first chronometer that measures longitude at sea was put to use.

With the chronometer, Magellan finally corrected the wrong nautical chart and realized his dream of traveling the world. Although the Age of Exploration had lasted for nearly 300 years, navigators never solved the problems with measuring the sea's longitude and many ships were lost at sea. Magellan adopted Harrison's watchmaking technology and drew a more accurate nautical chart.
|fame=29
|art=31
|fth=27
|civ=22
|tech=45
|ss1=Quarry Output +2%
|ss2=Quarry Output +4%
|ss3=Quarry Output +6%
|ss4=Quarry Output +10%
|ss7=Quarry Output +10%<br>Quarry Output +10% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill I.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, Snail DEF +20
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Blue Relics]]
[[Category:TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Blue TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Quarry Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Time Machine Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Wood Golem Boost]]
